allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add auto-switch logic for ad detection

- Add DeviceConfigDB model for fallback_channel and original_channel settings
- Implement auto-switch in POST /ad-results: switch to fallback when ad starts, return to original when ad ends
- Add new endpoints: GET/PUT /config, POST /config/current-channel
- Mobile app can now configure fallback channel and report current channel for return after ads

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
